title: Better HUD widgets
description: Advanced information HUD & interface customizer. Lightweight, draggable, and fully interactive.
body:
# HUD Better Widgets v2.1 - The Ultimate Survival Overlay

![Banner ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcceef4324bb349b23bd43306c11a1a3b602eb05.jpeg) 

**HUD BW** is a lightweight, highly customizable, and optimized HUD enhancement mod for Minecraft Fabric 1.21.11. It provides essential information in a clean, non-intrusive way, perfect for both technical players and casual survivalists.

Version 2.1 focuses on stability and a clean look, featuring a fully text-based potion display and improved gear tracking.
 
--- 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/oJwaoQfLGuk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## ✨ Features

* **In-Game Editor:** Press `K` (default) to open the editor.
* **Drag & Drop:** Move any element anywhere on your screen.
* **Smart Optimization:** Disabled widgets consume **zero** CPU resources.
* **Global Toggle:** Hide or show all elements with a single button.
* **Custom Backgrounds:** Toggle widget backdrops for better readability in any biome.
* **Built-in Calculator:** Fast math in chat via `/calcu <expression>`.

---

## 🎮 How to Control (Editor Mode)

When the Editor is open (default key: `K`), use your mouse to customize everything:

| Action | Result |
| --- | --- |
| **Left Click (LMB)** | **Drag & Move** the widget across the screen. |
| **Right Click (RMB)** | **Show / Hide** a specific widget (Red = Hidden). |
| **Scroll Wheel** | **Change Display Mode** (Cycle through styles). |

---

## 📊 Widgets & Modes

Every widget has multiple "Modes" accessible by **scrolling** over it in the editor:

### 🛡️ Gear Status (Armor & Mainhand)

*Tracking your Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots, and the item in your Main Hand.*

* **Mode 1:** Current Durability / Max (e.g., 250/365)
* **Mode 2:** Current Durability only (e.g., 250)
* **Mode 3:** Percentage (e.g., 68%)

### 📍 Coordinates (XYZ)

* **Mode 1:** Colored RGB (Red/Green/Blue values)
* **Mode 2:** Labeled (X: 100 Y: 64 Z: -500)
* **Mode 3:** **Nether Converter** (Shows Overworld coords and Nether equivalents simultaneously)

### 🧪 Potion Effects

*Clean, text-based list with accurate timers.*

* **Mode 1:** Shortened names (e.g., Str. 0:45)
* **Mode 2:** Full names (e.g., Strength II 0:45)
* **Infinite Support:** Shows the `∞` symbol for Beacon or permanent effects.

### ⚡ FPS & CPS Counter

* **FPS:** Simple number, Labeled, or **Pro Monitor** (FPS, AVG, and 1% Low).
* **CPS:** Total clicks or Split display (L: 7 R: 4).

### ⏰ Clock

* **Mode 1:** Real World Time (System clock)
* **Mode 2:** In-Game Time (Minecraft world time)

### 🎒 Additional Widgets

* **Inventory Space:** Shows remaining free slots in your bags.
* **Compass:** Displays your current facing direction (N, S, E, W).
* **Offhand Counter:** Displays total count of the item held in offhand (e.g., Totems or Rockets).
* **Enhanced Stats:** Accurate numeric values for HP, Food, and Saturation.

---

## 🔧 Commands

* `/calcu <expression>` — Simple calculator (e.g., `/calcu (120*8)+500`)

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Install **Fabric Loader** (1.21.11).
2. Drop the **HUD BW** jar and **Fabric API** into your `mods` folder.
3. Launch the game and press **K** to start customizing!

---

*Created for players who love data but hate clutter.*
